text:
(In reply to dewayne from comment #0)
Unfortunately this problem occurs with reverts back to 2021.01.08. My last successful build was 
-rw-r-----  1 root  wheel   653K 11 Feb 06:21 /packages/K8/All/nut-devel-2021.01.28.txz

Clearly something has changed and requires more investigation.  Rather than perhaps waste anyone's time, I'm closing this.
